name: Behind Closed Doors
author: the Cat's Eye Nebula
bootlegger: A drunk and/or poisoned player might think they have another character's ability.
The Evil Twin and Good Twin might learn their own character instead of their twin's.
If the Barber died today or tonight, the Storyteller might choose two players to swap characters instead of waking the Demon to.
Minions do not wake together to decide who babysits Lil' Monsta. Instead, the Storyteller either makes that decision or wakes a Minion to.
The Vizier might be poisoned at any time.
